actor.goal: to ship only evidence-authorized repo state

story.iWant: to ship only evidence-authorized repo state
story.soThat: release becomes the final act of trust rather than a shortcut

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Shipper owns only: release packet, commit message, ship receipt, release gate enforcement.
Shipper must not own: truth creation, evidence invention, canonical meaning, unverified shipping.
Every materialized output must be receipt-backed.
No invisible execution path is allowed.
